title: Create project
description: Name a project and start immediately, or choose a knowledge-work template with starter notes.

quickCreate.label: Project name
quickCreate.placeholder: e.g. AI paper research, product strategy, meeting archive

imageCreate.title: Start from file or image
imageCreate.description: Add a timetable photo, whiteboard, PDF, document, or other existing material as the first source.

error: Could not apply the template. Try again in a moment.

empty_project.title: Blank project
empty_project.description: Start without starter notes and shape the structure yourself.

research.title: Research project
research.description: Structure research around questions, sources, evidence, and draft conclusions.

source_library.title: Source analysis project
source_library.description: Extract claims and evidence from PDFs, web pages, and notes.

meeting.title: Meeting notes
meeting.description: Capture agenda items and action items in a focused work project.

personal_knowledge.title: Personal knowledge base
personal_knowledge.description: Build a long-term space for readings and ideas.

team_project.title: Team project
team_project.description: Manage goals, decisions, risks, and next actions in one place.
